role: Power Platform Developer | HR Process Optimization
achievements: Designed and deployed scalable Microsoft Power Platform solutions across regional HR operations, optimizing critical workflows and reporting cycles.
Automated complex HR processes including payroll support, performance tracking, and data validation, significantly reducing manual effort and errors.
Enhanced data reliability and reporting accuracy by building integrated Power Apps, Power Automate flows, and structured data pipelines.
Collaborated with cross-functional HR teams to align business requirements with digital solutions, contributing to large-scale HR digital transformation initiatives.
Architected and developed a full Contract Management System (CMS) using Power Apps, Dataverse, and Power Automate to manage the end-to-end procurement lifecycle.
Integrated external APIs (e.g., SAM.gov) into Dataverse to automate opportunity sourcing and eliminate manual data entry.
Designed complex workflow automation for multi-role processes (Discovery, Partner, Specialist, Submission), ensuring full traceability and auditability.
Built advanced reporting dashboards and tracking mechanisms to monitor contract progression, performance, and operational KPIs.
Delivered end-to-end Power Platform solutions for international clients across Europe, the UK, and the US, covering automation, data management, and business applications.
Translated complex business requirements into scalable Power Apps and Power Automate architectures.
Developed integrations using APIs, custom connectors, and automated workflows to connect multiple systems.
Optimized operational efficiency by replacing manual processes with fully automated digital solutions.

role: Power Platform Developer | HR & Learning Systems
achievements: Designed and built HR and Learning management solutions ('PO Tracker' and 'Learning Studio') using Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint, and Excel.
Digitized legacy tracking systems into centralized, user-friendly platforms, significantly reducing reporting time and operational friction.
Supported regional HR teams (MEAR) with data-driven tools to improve visibility and decision-making.
Enhanced user experience and system adoption through intuitive UI/UX design and automation.

role: Power Platform Developer | Event & Operations Systems
achievements: Developed a large-scale event management and registration platform supporting 15,000+ participants using Power Apps and Power Automate.
Implemented QR-based check-in systems, automated email confirmations, and real-time attendance dashboards.
Built end-to-end data pipelines for live reporting, analytics, and participant tracking.
Led technical coordination and system deployment during high-volume events, ensuring operational efficiency.
Built a change request management system using Power Apps to digitize internal workflows and approval processes.
Replaced manual and paper-based processes with automated solutions, improving communication and transparency.
Streamlined request tracking and decision-making through structured data and automated routing logic.
